title: PhD
biography: Eric Lander is an American geneticist who was a principal leader of the Human Genome Project. He founded and directed the Broad Institute and has been one of the most cited scientists in biomedicine.
aiSummary: Eric Lander is a genomics specialist at Broad Institute of MIT and Harvard. Based in Cambridge.

affiliations.hospitalName: Broad Institute of MIT and Harvard
